scripts.test:contract:dev: powershell -Command "& { $date = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm-ss'; Get-ChildItem -Path collections/contract-tests/*.json | ForEach-Object { newman run $_.FullName -e environments/development.postman_environment.json -r html --reporter-html-export reports/contract-tests/$date/contract-tests-report_$($_.Name).html } }"
scripts.test:newContract:dev: powershell -Command "& { $date = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm-ss'; Get-ChildItem -Path collections/new-contract-tests-dev/*.json | ForEach-Object { newman run $_.FullName -e environments/development.postman_environment.json -r html --reporter-html-export reports/new-contract-tests-dev/$date/new-contract-tests-dev-report_$($_.Name).html } }"

scripts.test:all:dev: npm run test:contract:dev && npm run test:functional:dev && npm run test:integration:dev && npm run test:performance-load:dev && npm run test:security:dev
scripts.test:newAll:dev: npm run test:newContract:dev && npm run test:newFunctional:dev && npm run test:newIntegration:dev && npm run test:newPerformance-load:dev && npm run test:newSecurity:dev
scripts.test:all:prod: npm run test:contract:prod && npm run test:functional:prod && npm run test:integration:prod && npm run test:performance-load:prod && npm run test:security:prod
scripts.test:newAll:prod: npm run test:newContract:prod && npm run test:newFunctional:prod && npm run test:newIntegration:prod && npm run test:newPerformance-load:prod && npm run test:newSecurity:prod
